title: cyclophyllum jasminifolium
intro: Cyclophyllum jasminifolium, also known as the Jasmine-leaf tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Cyclophyllum jasminifolium are numerous, including the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and anti-diarrheal agent. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
